title: Apple Music Lossless (ALAC) + Output Codec Overhaul
changes: Apple Music Lossless support via FairPlay wrapper — ALAC up to 24-bit/192kHz
Full ALAC decryption pipeline: wrapper → gamdl → R2 cache → browser
New output codec options: FLAC, WAV, ALAC, MP3, AAC (from ALAC), AAC (original 256kbps), OPUS
AAC (from ALAC) uses Max Download Quality selector instead of bitrate input
AAC (original) passes through Apple Music's native 256kbps without conversion
OPUS max bitrate raised to 510kbps (was 320)
Album Art settings now visible but disabled for OPUS/WAV (no cover art support)
Apple Music metadata applied server-side by gamdl — no FFmpeg.wasm needed for ALAC/AAC
Smart proxy transport: internal Docker traffic bypasses WARP SOCKS5
Wrapper healthcheck + retry logic with exponential backoff

title: Apple Music Integration
changes: Search Apple Music in parallel with Qobuz, merged results
Music source selector: Qobuz / Apple Music / Both
ISRC cross-lookup between Qobuz and Apple Music catalogs
Apple Music downloads proxied through Next.js to avoid R2 CORS issues
FastAPI sidecar for Apple Music download/decrypt/upload to Cloudflare R2
Frontend dynamically detects lossless capability via /api/get-apple-capabilities

title: Security Hardening
changes: Middleware rewritten with route whitelist — only valid paths allowed
Removed [catchall] route that was exploited for SSR injection attacks
Closed /_next/data/ bypass that allowed returnNaN/let SSR injection
Blocked POST on non-API routes to prevent body-based SSR injection
IPGate integration — 612M+ IPs blocked via FireHOL blocklists (O(1) lookup)
Bot UA detection for scanners (sqlmap, nikto, zgrab, nuclei)
Payload detection: eval(), require(), __proto__, path traversal, XSS
Blocked cryptominer dropper, WordPress scanner, mass downloader bot IPs

title: WARP Proxy & Token Rotation
changes: Cloudflare WARP SOCKS5 proxy for IP privacy on all outbound requests
Automatic IP rotation every 30 minutes via warp-rotator service
Smart token rotation on Qobuz rate limits (429/403/401)
Custom warp-cli Docker image with socat for container networking
Rich request logging with client IP, browser info, and token tracking

title: Native Country Support
changes: Countries can now natively be selected from the country picker (when enabled)! Multiple instances for different countries are no longer needed.

title: Custom Naming Variables & Reset Settings
changes: Added custom naming variables to the settings page. You can now customise the names of downloaded tracks and zip files using special formatting options.
Added reset settings button to the bottom of the settings page.

title: Change Log & PWA Support
changes: Changelog added and now is used to handle updates and fixes along with Discord notifications
Added PWA support for easy access of the site on a mobile device for example with the abilty to add to the homescreen
Changed the border radius style to slightly more rounded, :)
